issues.title: [Bug]: antigravity and minimax subscription option is missing in setup_worker_model in windows powershell
issues.body: ## Describe the Bug when we run `./scripts/setup_worker_model.ps1` , here Antigravity and minimax plan option is missing compared to when it runs on bash . ## To Reproduce run `./scripts/setup_worker_model.ps1` ## Expected Behavior the best for the setup worker should be same on all the OS hence script should provide the Antigravity option on powershell ## Screenshots on powershell on bash ## Environment - OS: windows - Python version: 3.11.9 - Docker version : 29.2.1
